summary: Iteration 73 - Tested Sale Voucher Payment Features: Cash/Bank mode selector, Bank account dropdown, Undo Payment functionality, Payment History with can_undo field. All 3 new features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test vouchers for payment flow verification. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment features are working correctly. Cash/Bank mode selector in payment dialog works - when Bank is selected, bank account dropdown appears with 'Bank of Baroda' option. Submit button text changes dynamically. Undo payment functionality removes all related entries (cash, ledger, local_party) and restores voucher balance. Payment History shows can_undo=true only for voucher payments (not advance entries).

details: Payment dialog shows Payment Mode dropdown
When Bank selected, Bank Account dropdown appears
Bank of Baroda available in dropdown
Submit button text changes: 'Cash mein Record Karein' -> 'Bank (Bank of Baroda) mein Record Karein'
POST /api/voucher-payment with account='bank', bank_name='Bank of Baroda'
Cash entry created with account='bank' and bank_name='Bank of Baroda'
POST /api/voucher-payment/undo deletes cash, ledger, and local_party entries
Voucher paid_amount and balance restored correctly
GET /api/voucher-payment/history/{party_name} returns history with can_undo field
UI shows undo button (red arrow) only for undoable payments
Sale Book shows 'Paid' badge (green) when balance <= 0
Payment button still shows even when Paid (for additional payments)
Gayatri Agro voucher correctly shows Paid with Rs.0 balance

backend_tests_passed: test_cash_payment_on_sale_voucher - Cash payment creates correct entries
test_bank_payment_on_sale_voucher - Bank payment creates entry with bank_name
test_undo_payment_flow - Full undo flow works correctly
frontend_tests_passed: Navigate to Vouchers > Sale Book - Works
Payment dialog opens from payment button - Works
Cash/Bank selector visible in payment dialog - Works
Bank account dropdown appears when Bank selected - Works
Submit button text changes dynamically - Works
Undo button visible for voucher payments - Works
Advance entries have no undo button - Works
Paid badge visible on Gayatri Agro - Works
Payment button visible even when Paid - Works
